checkout.declare_terms_acceptance: I declare that I have read and agree to all terms and conditions set forth in this contract and its Annex I. *

checkout.legal_team_contact_notice: Our legal team will contact you within 24 hours to start the visa application steps.
checkout.zelle_processed_message: We have received your Zelle payment receipt and our team is reviewing it.
checkout.what_happens_now_message: Our team is verifying your receipt. This process can take up to 48 business hours to complete.
checkout.confirmation_message: As soon as the payment is confirmed, you will receive an email with the next steps to start the visa process.
checkout.need_help_message: If you have any questions or need support, please contact us through our contact page.

zelle.title: Zelle Payment Details
zelle.step1: Complete the Zelle transfer with the exact amount in your banking app.
zelle.step2: Take a screenshot of the confirmation screen immediately after sending.
zelle.step3: Upload the image below for automatic processing.
zelle.images_only: IMAGES ONLY: Upload only screenshots (PNG/JPG). PDFs are not accepted.
zelle.image_requirements: The image must show: Confirmation Code, Date, Exact Amount, and Recipient (adm@migmainc.com).
zelle.select_screenshot: Select or drag the payment screenshot.
zelle.error_invalid_type: Please upload an image file (PNG/JPG only).

completed.title: Process Completed!

selection_fee.processing_desc: We received your payment receipt and it is currently being verified by our financial team.
selection_fee.time_notice: This process may take up to 48 business hours.
selection_fee.payment_confirmed_desc: Your Selection Process Fee of $400 has been received. Let's continue your journey to study in the USA.
selection_fee.pending_fee_desc: The Selection Process Fee of $400 has not been confirmed yet. Please complete the payment to continue.

identity.title: Profile Details
identity.subtitle: Fill in all the information below to continue.
identity.already_verified_desc: Your details have already been registered.

documents.title: Document Upload
documents.subtitle: Upload the required documents to continue.
documents.passport_desc: Upload a clear photo or scan of your passport (biographical page).
documents.diploma_desc: Upload your high school diploma or equivalent certificate.
documents.funds_desc: Bank statements showing minimum $22,000 USD (+ $5,000 per dependent).
documents.locked_notice: Documents submitted and locked for review.
documents.error_type: Only PDF, JPG or PNG files are accepted.
documents.error_all_required: Upload all required documents before continuing.

payment.title: Application Fee
payment.subtitle: Pay the application fee to submit your scholarship application.
payment.already_paid_desc: Your application fee has been confirmed.
payment.secure_notice: Secure payment processed by Stripe. Your card data is never stored.
payment.contact_advisor: Contact your advisor to complete this payment.

placement_fee.title: Placement Fee
placement_fee.subtitle: The Placement Fee is 20% of your scholarship's annual value. This covers the full placement service until your university acceptance.
placement_fee.already_paid_desc: Your Placement Fee has been confirmed. Our team will now process your application.
placement_fee.secure_notice: Secure payment processed by Stripe. Your card data is never stored.
placement_fee.contact_advisor: Contact your advisor to complete this payment.

waiting.title: Application Status
waiting.subtitle: Our team is working on your applications. We'll notify you with updates.
waiting.docs_approved_desc: Great news! Your documents have been approved. The university acceptance process is underway.
waiting.docs_rejected_desc: Some documents were not approved. Our team will contact you with instructions.
waiting.docs_under_review_desc: Your documents are being reviewed by our team. This typically takes 3-5 business days.
waiting.deadline_passed_transfer: Transfer deadline has passed. Contact your advisor immediately.
waiting.deadline_passed_cos: I-94 / status has expired. Contact your advisor immediately.
waiting.deadline_approaching_transfer: Your transfer deadline is approaching. Ensure all documents are submitted.
waiting.deadline_approaching_cos: Your I-94 / status expiry is approaching. Contact your advisor.
waiting.docs_review_desc: Your documents are being reviewed by our team. This typically takes 3-5 business days.
